nutshell.headline: 76 new failures — mainly Segment, QuotaGroup
nutshell.causeText: No build changes — likely test/data or environment flakiness.
nutshell.investigation: New fails: 31× server NestedServletException / NPE (QA threw NestedServletException/NPE/IOOB); 16× assertion Condition not satisfied. Vs prior #3.0.2635: up 78 total fails.
bullets: 31× server NestedServletException / NPE — org.springframework.web.util.NestedServletException:Handler dispatch failed; nested exception is java.lang.Abs
14× NOT_FOUND / missing data — org.springframework.dao.EmptyResultDataAccessException: Incorrect result size: expected 1, actual 0

detail.investigation: 76 of 78 unmuted failures are new since the prior build (#3.0.2635, 0 fails). Failure types (new-first): (1) 31× server NestedServletException / NPE — QA threw NestedServletException/NPE/IOOB — product/server bug in that path. (2) 16× assertion Condition not satisfied — Spock assertion failed (fixture or response shape). (3) 14× NOT_FOUND / missing data — missing DB row / EmptyResult / NOT_FOUND. (4) 14× API ValidationException — API rejected the request (business validation). Hot areas among new fails: Segment (23), QuotaGroup (17), Quota (13), PartnerEvent (13), SampleRules (6), Fieldwork (3). Example new failures: AudienceGroup: Audience group E2E — quota, template, rename, clone, deleted list, undelete, reorder [NOT_FOUND / missing data]; Fieldwork: Configure fieldwork and verify impact on project counters: com.dynata.rest.gateway.nexusap [server NestedServletException / NPE]; Fieldwork: Update soft launch configuration with active partners and delivery settings: com.dynata.re [server NestedServletException / NPE]; Fieldwork: Configure soft launch with exclusions and verify impact on partner events: com.dynata.rest [server NestedServletException / NPE].
bullets: 31× server NestedServletException / NPE — org.springframework.web.util.NestedServletException:Handler dispatch failed; nested exception is java.lang.Abs
14× NOT_FOUND / missing data — org.springframework.dao.EmptyResultDataAccessException: Incorrect result size: expected 1, actual 0
